name: Lagazuoi: Echoes of The Great War - EARLY ACCESS

reviews.review_description: so disappointed with this "game", for starters there are no "intense battles with enemy forces". It is only shooting at smoke with the machine gun, and it just stops smoking. also the weapons and tools are aggravating to deal with. the Ai generated voices while you play is annoying And there are no other soldiers just people talking about comrades. the character say 2 CURSE WORDS during the gameplay, which is only 17-20 minutes, And there is no smooth turn only snap,and only teleportation. Maybe if the developer fixs all this I will enjoy the game.

Short but well made with considerable detail. I might be missing something but it only took me 20 minutes. The graphics are nice and it is a fun play through. It is a guy ready a letter to his parents while you do the stuff he says he did. They also give you hints on you left hand. It feels very realistic and I love how you can grab and mess with almost any other item.  It only has 2 levels (unless I am missing something) and it said that I can play the others when the full game releases.

If you could make it so their are other NPC's to talk to that would be cool. Also I encountered 1 curse word. It was not a very bad one but please please please please please take it out! And don't add any more!!!!!!!! Seriously this is a bad idea! No foul language. Period. Don't add any more!!!

One thing I wish you would add is a option to move around with the joystick. Like a functional menu button with settings so you can change stuff like teleportation to joystick, and main hand from right to left or vice versa.

Also I saw one other review stating that they could not change the language. If you hit the wrong one by accident at the beginning how are you going to play if you can't change it back? So if you could add that to the settings that would be awesome.

Bottom line: fun experience, well made and detailed. Needs a few improvements but overall is a great game.

I cannot change it to English or play 
the game how

developer_response.body: Goodmorning, I m sorry you encountered this problem, you can change the language at the beginning of the game, you can either touch the english or the italian flag.
